title: fwdmod
description: This mod by sjvwbwh，It added a little bit of content.This mod adds the boss—Kobe, among others. But It only supports Chinese translation.
body:
The mod created by sjvwbwh with a great deal of creativity using MCreator. It adds the achievements of the swh mod. As long as you have the Little God of War Blade of sjvwbwh in your inventory, you can obtain this achievement. The mod also adds the Little God of War Blade of sjvwbwh, the Edible Barrier, the "Holy Moly Thunder" weapon, and the Mob Spawn Egg of sjvwbwh. It can be used with NeoForge on the server side.

The Little God of War Blade of sjvwbwh: Why is it called the Little God of War Blade of sjvwbwh? Because I don't know how to adjust its size.
The Little God of War Blade of sjvwbwh has a damage value of 99,999, which gives a bit of the feeling of "one hit for 999".

The Edible Barrier: The Edible Barrier has the texture of a barrier, but it can be eaten. Currently, there is no known crafting method for it.

The "Holy Moly Thunder" weapon: The texture of this weapon was drawn randomly by the author. It has the same damage value as the Little God of War Blade of sjvwbwh.

The Mob Spawn Egg of sjvwbwh: I made this. Its head will fly around everywhere. I spent a long time trying to fix it but didn't succeed. It has a health value of 999 and has a boss health bar. It can spawn randomly. It is equipped with a full set of Netherite armor. In its left hand, it holds a Command Block, and in its right hand, it holds the Little God of War Blade of sjvwbwh. It can be tamed with dirt.
